accountWelcome.title: Congrats, {{username}}! 🎉
accountWelcome.subtitle: Your account is ready — here's what you can do now 👇
accountWelcome.f1: 🎉 Start a hangout and gather people right now
accountWelcome.f2: 📅 Organize an event in your city
accountWelcome.f3: 💬 Send a private message to anyone

onboarding.slide1Body: Locals and travelers meet here — through real challenges.
onboarding.slide2Body: 🍜 Best banh mi · 📍 Hidden viewpoint · 🎭 Speak some Vietnamese · 🙏 Help with a SIM. Real challenges that lead to a real meet-up.
onboarding.slide3Body: Take it on, pick a date together, meet IRL, share the story.
onboarding.slide4Body: Free account. Pick a name. Jump in.

slide1.title: Challenges turn trips into stories
slide1.body: Locals and travelers dare each other to share what makes a city real — food, places, culture, help. The reward? You meet in person.

slide2.title: Launch your dare
slide2.body: Food, place, culture or help. Pick who it's for, how many spots, and the little twist that ends in a meet-up.

slide3.title: Someone takes it on
slide3.body: They send a request. You review it and accept — your private thread unlocks so you can chat and plan.

slide4.title: Meet in person
slide4.body: Pick a date you both like. The pipeline tracks every step. Then make it happen — for real.

slide5.title: Wrap it up
slide5.body: After the meet-up, mark it accomplished. Your city, lived for real — one challenge at a time.

slide6.title: Beyond your city
slide6.body: Challenge anyone, anywhere. They send proof — a photo or video with geotag — and you validate from afar. Local or global, every challenge counts.

connectionHint: Check your connection and try again.
